ns0:entry.ns0:title: BurntSushi/ripgrep
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep
Language: rust
ripgrep recursively searches directories for a regex pattern while respecting your gitignore

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EricLBuehler/mistral.rs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EricLBuehler/mistral.rs
Language: rust
Fast, flexible LLM inference

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
Language: rust
Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentgateway/agentgateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentgateway/agentgateway
Language: rust
Next Generation Agentic Proxy for AI Agents and MCP servers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: astral-sh/ruff
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/astral-sh/ruff
Language: rust
An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: biomejs/biome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/biomejs/biome
Language: rust
A toolchain for web projects, aimed to provide functionalities to maintain them. Biome offers formatter and linter, usable via CLI and LSP.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cube-js/cube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cube-js/cube
Language: rust
📊 Cube Core is open-source semantic layer for AI, BI and embedded analytics

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dbt-labs/dbt-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core
Language: rust
dbt enables data analysts and engineers to transform their data using the same practices that software engineers use to build applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmtrKovalenko/fff
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmtrKovalenko/fff
Language: rust
The fastest and the most accurate file search SDK for AI agents, Neovim, Rust, C, Python, Bun and NodeJS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io

ns0:entry.ns0:title: googleworkspace/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli
Language: rust
Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: n0-computer/iroh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/n0-computer/iroh
Language: rust
IP addresses break, dial keys instead. A library that adds QUIC + NAT Traversal to your apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ogulcancelik/herdr
Language: rust
agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/codex
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: t8y2/dbx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/t8y2/dbx
Language: rust
15MB, lightweight, cross-platform database client. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Redis, MongoDB, DuckDB, ClickHouse, SQL Server and more.15MB，轻量级跨平台数据库客户端、数据库管理工具。支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQLite、Redis、MongoDB、DuckDB、ClickHouse、SQL Server 等。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tursodatabase/turso
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tursodatabase/turso
Language: rust
Turso is an in-process SQL database, compatible with SQLite.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
